summary: Full backend + frontend testing for AutoAce landing page. All 6 pytest cases pass (leads CRUD + validation + persistence). Playwright covers full E2E: landing loads, all 9 sections visible, images load, navbar/hero smooth-scroll to correct anchors, HTML5 validation blocks empty submit, filled form POSTs successfully, sonner toast shown, and form clears after success. No critical or minor issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: POST /api/leads returns 200 (FastAPI default). Consider explicit status_code=201 for resource creation semantics — minor, non-blocking.
server.py: Lead.email is a plain str; consider EmailStr (pydantic) to reject malformed emails at API level. Frontend already uses type='email' but API is permissive.
server.py: No rate limiting on public POST /api/leads — could be abused for spam. Consider basic throttling/captcha before going to production.
LeadForm.jsx: axios error is caught with bare `catch` (no logging). Adding console.error would help debugging in prod.
Landing.jsx: All landing components rendered eagerly. For faster TTI consider lazy-loading below-the-fold sections.
test_credentials: N/A - public landing page, no auth
seed_data_creation: Test leads created via API with TEST_ prefix during pytest run and one E2E lead via UI submission (email: e2e_test@example.com). Not cleaned up but harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend leads API + landing UI are healthy. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_leads_api.py can be reused as regression suite. Sections tested via data-testid: navbar, hero-section, trust-bar, features-section, roi-section, hybrid-section, founder-section, lead-form-section, footer. All smooth-scroll anchors verified (#platform, #roi, #team, #demo). Toast library is sonner mounted in App.js; toast selector used: [data-sonner-toast].
